sources.title: Dynamite (MGM, 1929) CECIL B DEMILLE🍕 CHARLES BICKFORD🍕 OSCAR NOMINEE
sources.description:
It's Friday @PizzaFLIX 
Directed by Cecil B. DeMille
Starring Charles Bickford, Kay Johnson, Conrad Nagel
🍕Oscar Nominee for Best Art Direction🍕
Tonight, it’s a see-it-to-believe-it spectacle from the legendary CECIL B. DEMILLE—his first all-talking production and his MGM debut! This EXPLOSIVE mash-up of Rom-Com, Melodrama, and Disaster flick features a coal miner on death row, a bratty heiress desperate for a quick husband, her socialite lover, and his naughty wife—juggling more affairs than she can count! Brimming with all the loose morals you’d expect from Pre-Code Hollywood, this is one wild ride you don’t want to miss!

Directed by Cecil B. DeMille and written by Jeanie Macpherson, Dynamite showcases DeMille’s signature lavish production design and gripping storytelling. Fans of Golden Age Hollywood, Pre-Code cinema, and early talkies will love this rare treasure from the PizzaFLIX vault.

Are you a PizzaFLIX Fanatic? Join our exclusive Fan Club for dedicated Classic movie lovers: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE34fwgW7kWr7tc7YiOWtRw/join

Watch now and experience a slice of classic MGM history! Don’t forget to LIKE, COMMENT & SUBSCRIBE for more classic movies. May the Sauce be with you! 🍕

 #CecilBDeMille #PreCodeHollywood #ClassicMovies #Dynamite1929 #CharlesBickford #KayJohnson #ConradNagel #GoldenAgeHollywood #OscarNominated #Prison movies #ClassicMovies #Pre-CodeHollywood #1929sFilms #FullMovie #OldHollywood #ClassicCinema #Oscar Nominee #PizzaFLIX

metadata.Plot: Moving two young students to a building with different neighbors poses challenges and problems for them.
metadata.Actors: Pejman Jamshidi, Ahmad Mehranfar, Nazanin Bayati
